headline: A Look At PG&E (PCG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Conflicting Fair Value Models
summary: PG&E stock snapshot and recent performance PG&E (PCG) continues to attract attention as investors weigh its latest share performance against the company’s scale, with a market value of about US$38.2b and annual revenue of US$24.9b. The stock shows a 2.1% decline over the past day and a 3.3% decline over the past week, while the price is about 2% lower than a month ago and 11.9% higher over the past 3 months.
